name: Chapar Relay
label: Chapar
description: A Nostr relay that only accepts chat app events (NIP-59)

requiredConfig.name: Relay Domain
requiredConfig.description: The domain name for your Nostr relay (e.g., relay.example.com)

requiredConfig.name: Owner Pubkey (hex)
requiredConfig.description: The relay owner's public key in hex format

requiredConfig.name: Contact
requiredConfig.description: Contact info for the relay operator
